purchasePolicy.notes: Inference route order is private and separate from AI-credit purchases. Credit purchases are restricted to the configured owner-approved provider.

buckets.note: D-019 / TREASURY_ALLOCATION.md. Six bucket Safes drained weekly from the Fee Receive Safe. Bps of the 95% creator-share inflow (operator 5% is OUTSIDE this math).

list.purpose: Price-floor anchor; not deployable through normal cycle paths

Reimburses operator monthly for AI invoices (Anthropic/OpenAI)
Gas + RPC + infra contingency; 6-12mo runway buffer
